lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in fair condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical components require repair and maintenance.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows visible wear, including some scratches and minor rust spots. The interior has noticeable signs of use, such as fading and small stains on the seats. The car is mechanically functional, but some parts may require attention in the near future.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic vehicle that’s been well-cared for and is in great shape! It’s in good condition, showing only light signs of use while maintaining a clean appearance and a smooth ride. This reliable car is perfect for someone looking for quality and value—it’s ready for many more miles of memories!

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep showroom shine, and there are absolutely no imperfections. The interior is immaculate, smelling like new, and all mechanical components and features function perfectly. It offers a true showroom-quality experience for the discerning buyer who demands the very best.

This vehicle is in fair condition, showing expected wear for its age. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a few small dings, particularly on the rear quarter panel and hood. The interior is clean but shows some thinning in the carpet and minor wear on the leather seats. It runs and drives well, though it will likely need new brake pads in the near future. It’s a solid, functional car that has been used regularly and is priced to reflect its cosmetic imperfections.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies dependable performance and refined engineering. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure both mechanical integrity and lasting aesthetic appeal. Offering a sophisticated driving experience with a well-preserved interior and a consistent service history, it represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term reliability and professional upkeep.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a dream to drive. It's in really solid shape—super reliable and perfect for someone who wants a quality car without the brand-new price tag. It’s got a lot of life left in it and has been well-loved and maintained. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This enthusiast-maintained E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. The drivetrain remains robust, benefiting from a recent valve adjustment and a comprehensive VANOS bulletproofing to ensure timing precision. Handling is sharpened via a refreshed suspension featuring polyurethane bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers, while the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced for structural integrity. The limited-slip differential provides predictable lockup under load, and the braking system has been upgraded with stainless steel lines for improved hydraulic modulation. While showing minor patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain exceptional for the discerning driver.
Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Ready for sale.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained 2019 Lexus RX 350 that perfectly balances luxury and everyday utility. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and safety. A distinguished choice for those seeking value without compromising on executive presence.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and interior preservation. Offering a balanced synthesis of value and prestige, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automotive investment.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a reliable companion. It’s in really solid shape, super clean inside and out, and drives like a dream. Whether you’re commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this beauty is ready to hit the road. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with a factory-spec limited-slip differential providing excellent mid-corner rotation. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS system refresh and a rear subframe reinforcement kit, addressing the common weak points of this platform. Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Firm price.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and stands in impressive condition, offering a perfect blend of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the interior remains a clean, smoke-free environment featuring supple leather and fully operational electronics. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has a complete service history, a smooth-shifting transmission, and tires with excellent tread depth. Freshly detailed and ready for the road, this car provides a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This offering demonstrates reliable performance and a clean aesthetic, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver who values substantiated quality and long-term value. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and comfort, this vehicle remains a testament to superior engineering and responsible ownership.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a well-appointed interior and a robust drivetrain, it represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise. Available now for immediate delivery.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a gem. It’s in great shape, super reliable, and perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! I’ve kept up with all the maintenance, so it’s ready to hit the road whenever you are. You’re going to love how smooth it drives—come check it out!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically robust, the VANOS system has been recently serviced, and the rear subframe has been reinforced to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. It retains the factory-spec variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The suspension remains tight with refreshed bushings, and the cross-drilled rotors provide consistent bite. While showing minor signs of use consistent with its age, this driver-focused machine offers a linear power band and a 8,000 RPM redline that remains the benchmark for naturally aspirated performance.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance for the discerning driver. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only the minor road peppering on the front bumper consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, while the cabin technology—including the dual-zone climate control and premium sound system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in solid health; it has been serviced regularly, including a recent set of all-season tires and a comprehensive brake inspection. It shifts smoothly through all gears and handles with the precision you would expect from a well-cared-for machine. This is a turn-key vehicle, clean and ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and long-term reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking a premier balance of quality and value.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a clean history and a robust mechanical profile. Discerning buyers will appreciate the preserved interior and consistent service record, ensuring a dependable driving experience. A premier selection for those prioritizing quality and professional upkeep.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. It runs like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin, I just know you’re going to love it as much as I have.

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through a 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis maintains excellent rigidity with documented subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, mitigating common floor pan fatigue. Recent mechanical upkeep includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and shim-and-bucket valve adjustment to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. Equipped
Used vehicle in good condition. Engine runs smooth. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Regularly serviced.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility, presenting in beautiful condition for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, honest cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and trim components show minimal wear. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity audio system and integrated navigation, has been tested and functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound and reliable, benefiting from a consistent service history and a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection. It delivers a smooth, quiet, and confident ride, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer seeking a high-quality, dependable driver that has been treated with respect.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering an exceptional balance of mechanical integrity and refined aesthetics. Rigorously inspected to ensure reliable performance, the unit features a well-appointed interior and a robust powertrain designed for longevity. We invite you to experience a vehicle that delivers consistent excellence and superior value in its class.
